name: Suri Tiny Home Plan - 10x20 Modern Backyard ADU | DIY Tiny House Plans
open_features: Modern minimalist architecture ideal for compact lots, backyard ADUs, and multi-purpose outdoor living.
Straightforward framing, clean rooflines, and efficient dimensions make Suri approachable for first-time builders and experienced DIYers alike.
Thoughtfully placed doors and windows provide natural light, ventilation, and a comfortable indoor flow without sacrificing privacy.
Horizontal wood siding, modern trim details, and a single-pitch roof create a stylish modern-rustic aesthetic that complements any property.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Suri Tiny Home - a sleek 10x20 modern living and working space thoughtfully designed for efficiency, versatility, and clean architectural style. With its compact footprint and smart proportions, Suri delivers big potential in a streamlined form that fits beautifully into backyards, side yards, and tight urban lots. Featuring a modern single-slope roof, warm horizontal wood siding, and crisp contemporary lines, Suri offers a refined exterior paired...
